name: @omni-wasm/c
description: Browser-native C interpretation via WebAssembly. picoc interpreter built from source, no server required.

scripts.build:wasm: docker build -t omni-wasm-c . && docker run --rm -v $(pwd)/dist/wasm:/output omni-wasm-c
scripts.build:all: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts
scripts.copy:wasm: mkdir -p dist/wasm && cp -r src/wasm/* dist/wasm/ 2>/dev/null || true

author: Sergio De Vita
